text: 你是誰的老鼠?你是誰的老鼠?Whose mouth are you?誰的都不是Nobody's mouth你媽媽呢?Where is your mother?在貓的肚子裡Inside the cat你爸爸呢?Where is your father?掉到了陷阱裡Caught in a trap你姐姐呢?Where is your sister?在離家很遠的地方Far from home你弟弟呢?Where is your brother?我沒有弟弟I have none你打算怎麼辦?What will you do?把我媽媽從貓的肚子裡抖出來Shake my mother out of the cat把我爸爸從陷阱裡救出來Free my father from the trap去找我姐姐把他接回家Find my sister and bring her home希望我有一個弟弟因為我沒有Wish for a brotheras I have none現在你是誰的老鼠呢?Now whose mouth are you?我媽媽的老鼠她很愛我My mother's mouthShe loves me so我爸爸的老鼠從頭到腳都是My father's mouthfrom head to toe我姐姐的老鼠她也愛我My sister's mouthShe loves me too我弟弟的老鼠My brother's mouth你弟弟的老鼠Your brother's mouth我弟弟的老鼠他剛剛才出生My brother's mouthHe's brand new
去找我姐姐 把她接回家Find my sister and bring her home
希望我有一個弟弟 因為我沒有Wish for a brother as I have none現在你是誰的老鼠呢?Now whose mouth are you?
我媽媽的老鼠 它很愛我My mother's mouse. She loves me so.
我爸爸的老鼠從頭到腳都是My father's mouse from head to toe
我姐姐的老鼠 它也愛我My sister's mouse, she loves me too
我弟弟的老鼠My brother's mouse你弟弟的老鼠Your brother's mouse
我弟弟的老鼠 他剛剛才出生My brother's mouth is brand new
你是誰的老鼠?Whose mouth are you?
誰的都不是 Nobody's mouth你媽媽呢? Where is your mother?
在貓的肚子裡inside the cat你爸爸呢?Where is your father?
掉到了陷阱里Caught in a trap 你姐姐呢?Where is your sister?
在離家很遠的地方Far from home你弟弟呢?Where is your brother?
我沒有弟弟 I have none 你打算怎麼辦?What will you do?
把我媽媽從貓的肚子里抖出來Shake my mother out of the cat
把我爸爸从陷阱里救出来。Free my father from the trap.
